allow: Bash(node -e "const s=process.argv[1].normalize\('NFD'\).replace\(/[̀-ͯ]/g,''\).toLowerCase\(\).replace\(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,'-'\).replace\(/^-+|-+\\$/g,''\); console.log\('slug =>', s\);" "Coffret Dresseur d'élite \(ETB\) - Évolutions Prisme")
PowerShell($env:NODE_ENV="development"; npx next typegen; if \($?\) { npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "HOME status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Ajouter au panier|Pr.commander|catalogue'\) { "HOME: contenu catalogue détecté" } } catch { "HOME ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
